/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libobstacle_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libobstacle_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle_array__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/craz/mobile_robot_planning/build/obstacle_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libobstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
